entries.gt_5709cddf4b23fc: check the crack before the pocket
entries.gt_571509430a87f5: if the sample moves during the siren, carry it to the lab, not the kitchen
entries.gt_5771e933a77b39: If an item has a tag, read the tag before the siren.
entries.gt_57af26d961376f: near the kitchen, a coupon is sometimes worth more than a ruble
entries.gt_588a747de41271: it has durability, but after a long fight it needs checking
entries.gt_5916938bde3f1b: sweet does not cancel the latrine later
entries.gt_59794305006343: killing an endless tail without the source is tiring and expensive
entries.gt_59d34c50575568: tea helps a conversation, if there is no blood on the floor
entries.gt_5a2cdf0545fb12: a worn-off number can confuse a thief
entries.gt_5a909cf38a37a3: a second click in panic is often worse than the first
entries.gt_5b0b03cae15470: slow precise shot with good damage
entries.gt_5b103eb60bfecc: If you find a new route, mark the nearest door, lift, and latrine at once.
entries.gt_5b15706544d0da: Count rounds by weapon type. 7.62, 7.62 TT, and 9mm are not one box.
entries.gt_5c323c374104d7: lure it onto dry ground, hit it there, and do not waste a burst into the puddle
entries.gt_5c562705e2217e: after a Fogman, that material is often requested
entries.gt_5ce3c652a9e969: an access error throws you back first, then asks about your health
entries.gt_5d9b12f3c1e496: can give PSI and alertness after opening
entries.gt_5ed29764cfad4a: slowing before the second web is often fatal
entries.gt_5f423c9d9c2c2f: do not stand in water, keep the dry edge and strike before the lunge
entries.gt_5f99aca023ce42: Use the vacuum cleaner to clear a path to a door or lift. The charge is not for cleaning the whole floor's history.
entries.gt_600a34ba67c032: a fog strip is not empty if footsteps vanished inside it
entries.gt_604e8d68791032: take the needed paper quickly, close the task, and withdraw
entries.gt_60a285751a7b53: hold it like a tool, not fireworks
entries.gt_60bc0bb22da8a9: If the device turns green after a sample, cover the device and call a technician.
entries.gt_60eb71dd40de5d: looks for a host and changes owners
entries.gt_60f4a0e8ba4055: If you hear the siren in someone else's storeroom, take what you need and leave. The property dispute can wait.
entries.gt_62d78077172c89: Barni respects rounds, distance, and an honest weapon check. He respects an empty magazine less.
entries.gt_62ddcfeefc6f29: a mournful howl is not a reason to open the door face-first
entries.gt_62fd4c2591ff2d: not every key fits your panic
entries.gt_630be3aad2b81d: move the ally out of the passage before throwing
entries.gt_63310bd8fa0368: chalk on the wall is not read aloud without a reason
entries.gt_63658c38479247: If you robbed the kitchen, come back later too. But with a weapon or an apology.
entries.gt_644c1b60438416: If the room is too quiet, check the floor, ceiling, and exit. Then the box.
entries.gt_64c88873ff3af4: An open door behind you is good only until the first beast behind you.
entries.gt_65a7e7e4151929: do not sell it before a trip into the fog
entries.gt_665f73923660a3: do not stand at the terminal after a failure; keep an exit and do not start hacks back to back
entries.gt_6664c4edea052f: documents in hand can be bait
entries.gt_6694f8ff036644: its hole sometimes gives a bypass, but first check who heard the noise
entries.gt_66ce8957d26310: after a skip, the route is better written down in pencil
entries.gt_67026892ee4c9d: the medpost and checkpoints value clean water
entries.gt_6788cdbcec7471: Olga Dmitrievna heals the body, but does not excuse stupidity. Come before the bandage soaks through.
entries.gt_68464df45764eb: slow precise industrial shot for water passages
entries.gt_68c979e2e2edcb: open the lid before the fight, not at the doors
entries.gt_69132839a2bfb6: do not rely on the first closed leaf; change rooms and keep a second barrier
entries.gt_6930753b505897: stronger than an ordinary pill against a dirty wound
entries.gt_694eb9bd1005f7: scientists and cultists pay for different stories of the same thing
entries.gt_69648f28ba1aef: do not corner her without a plan; first judge the conversation and the retreat path
entries.gt_69b41d9e0a291f: do not keep it as a souvenir during heavy bleeding
entries.gt_6a10a9a86be07b: Major Gromny does not like wet filters or pretty explanations. He needs rounds, wounded people, and a route.
entries.gt_6b5b3dc2c46c31: against a crowd, rupture or buckshot is better
entries.gt_6bac350f0cc25a: a crowbar works as both weapon and argument at the storeroom
entries.gt_6cc372bfdee659: goes into a filter or bandage
entries.gt_6d99ebb81c1b5b: raises satiety quickly and is often taken from the kitchen
entries.gt_6e9134f6be1a32: spend buckshot on a target that has entered the sector
entries.gt_6ecc51404e8c89: gives a little water and is often found in the kitchen
entries.gt_6efdca9250766c: If an enemy is strong by the wall, move to the center. The wall is not your comrade in this fight.
entries.gt_6f1b49392dc425: take the chair when it is better than bare hands
entries.gt_6f93301504b21e: thirst gathers a queue, a fight, and witnesses
entries.gt_6fb8389944ad16: helps after spores and fungal itch
entries.gt_70070570e66400: Keep quest documents dry. Water spoils more than the filter.
entries.gt_700d0cd4347cb6: goes for papers and rustles documents
entries.gt_702cb1467157ca: cut mold only after checking skin and boots
entries.gt_7086316e30840a: buckshot is worth more if you let the enemy reach sure range
entries.gt_70b2486146dcef: gives passage through a wall for a short time
entries.gt_71ac3a4a156a62: reading in combat is useful only to the obituary
entries.gt_71b9931f29b46a: keep energy cells and an exit from the terminal
entries.gt_71ff9e4a74d0d9: water, pipes, and darkness cut off a simple retreat
entries.gt_723e1976c11f3a: trade carefully, do not strike first, and do not open slime without a task
entries.gt_733a5756644100: getting stuck inside a wall without PSI is a bad end to the route
entries.gt_737bbf2215c296: Do not take all rare things at once. One quest item in living hands is better than three on a corpse.
entries.gt_739488c63144b0: melee with a robot without a corner quickly repairs the morgue, not you
entries.gt_7397c23a365143: NII and hunters ask about origin more often than taste
entries.gt_73cdfe76d165ad: this is a NET gun, not a hammer for every wall
entries.gt_748173056e3d9b: hit the host from range and do not let it near NPCs
entries.gt_74898ec0082a4e: Found a strong clot? Check PSI at once. You can carry it without reserve, but not fire it.
entries.gt_7623955f03176c: after a pack, check pockets only with the door closed
entries.gt_763f595b1c5cd3: someone else's line can become a case
entries.gt_76af2be1fc75c2: If an enemy goes for documents, put the documents away and stop being an archive on legs.
entries.gt_774b72f2ec92b2: if you wait for the blow in place, it will have time to accelerate
entries.gt_77f91c8294462f: holds one room like its own apartment
entries.gt_7835dbfdbc4716: shoots at light and likes an active flashlight
entries.gt_787a2feb6136ea: keep pills no deeper than the bandage in your bag
entries.gt_78b51be72ab72e: you cannot read near it for long
entries.gt_78bba7ac19adfc: the spade is handy when the backpack is already packed
entries.gt_7932ee004ec203: break distance, leave the lit spot, or strike fast
entries.gt_79a8dfe5262900: at the church kitchen, kulich can open a conversation
entries.gt_7a075322bc7eca: following her without a flashlight means arriving where she wanted
entries.gt_7a1be149c04191: damage is medium; against armor you need a retreat plan
entries.gt_7b3f1eb79e289f: keep an exit from the console and do not stand face-first in the screen
entries.gt_7baa468461a11a: buys 15 seconds of someone else's friendship
entries.gt_7c3536d11273de: presses a passage and a pack if there is a belt
entries.gt_7c483eb1a75aa4: If you are tired, misses and bad decisions become more common. Sleep is cheaper than funerals.
entries.gt_7c7285e0989e21: comes from a crack, ventilation, or a void source
entries.gt_7cab582104b378: dense food before a long road
entries.gt_7cba3a682591c1: then the target becomes a problem again
entries.gt_7cc909cd2e3a98: you need a route back even on the roof
entries.gt_7d0baacf4a5182: while the cook lives, the kitchen is more useful than a looted cupboard
entries.gt_7d270793acc0a6: this is one strong impulse, not a new life
entries.gt_7d65379e726878: a blood-soaked bandage in a minute means you need a doctor
entries.gt_7d8f8f69efbe94: paper can open a door or close a route
entries.gt_7df0dc80a6f26b: do not fire near the reward, document, or only passage
entries.gt_7e3d3297a2597b: after a failure, withdraw, then read the log
entries.gt_7eb34bade7c59f: solves a strong target with a burst and holds a checkpoint
entries.gt_7eb8efd6366a5d: do not stand in water if you hear a pipe or ripples
entries.gt_7f1f3cb1fc96ba: can talk, run, and fight in a corner
entries.gt_7fb30ea838a5ff: do not step on a suspicious carpet; check with light and keep salt or fire
entries.gt_7fb585b6cb246c: slower, so do not let a pack get too close
entries.gt_80b1cd0d86904e: pull it into the center, circle it, and do not let it pin you down
entries.gt_80c5aa9c712f7e: Return before the backpack becomes the cause of death. A full pocket does not close a hermodoor.
entries.gt_8124dcaae86450: accurate in a long passage and useful in production
entries.gt_8138a3437ffcbe: place the mark and keep reserve before entering the wall
entries.gt_82db5ed3150c73: Liquidators tolerate dirt worse than poverty. Samples, corpses, and contraband are better filed before inspection.
entries.gt_82fef91df5c21f: inspection likes a clean floor, but not a corpse in the corner
entries.gt_83193492f24150: after firing, check whether the way back is still there
entries.gt_83328d70688159: cuts the line in front of you
entries.gt_83a45eccf72e46: A forgery is useful only until inspection. Keep an honest reserve for retreat.
entries.gt_8488561c1d8837: Scientists do not like a heroic story instead of a protocol. Sample number, seal, and date work better.
entries.gt_84b0c14997fcc3: Still check a rumor with an address. In GIGAHRUSH, someone else's confidence quickly becomes your wound.
entries.gt_84bdb48d49bb19: do not draw a weapon without a reason
entries.gt_84db1d09d7cc38: saving a strong round on her works only with an open door back
entries.gt_84fe1bfc0cc199: a full backpack is louder to it than footsteps
entries.gt_84fea2ad7dafe7: emergency food when there are no other options
entries.gt_851c20ad839949: put the weapon away if you came to talk
entries.gt_85af66e16d4031: if the cabin is strange, step back and look for another call
entries.gt_85d73c0644f525: slow precise shot against armor and a Betonnik
entries.gt_85e43219868119: the first shot there quickly becomes politics
entries.gt_85ea7284af7e0f: after it, check not the trophy, but the list of missing nearby
entries.gt_85f2a8696fd30d: its tracks often lead to a pipe, not a safe stash
entries.gt_86066bb1e09093: sits on roots and holds red mold
entries.gt_866767be1363da: accurate cheap shot against a weak target and a person with a weapon
entries.gt_87369b5e2b63fb: clean the passage with a vacuum cleaner, not the whole floor
entries.gt_87ab8e70688970: do not close off your only retreat
entries.gt_87b29f6dc29bcb: clean the path, not the whole floor
entries.gt_8879cea7bd83be: throw bait aside, keep fire or buckshot, and leave the trash
entries.gt_888c59df3dcca3: ${place.name}: check the door, noise, and route back before looting.
entries.gt_8902b2704a5b84: If you helped the kitchen, come back later. Food, rumors, and gratitude appear in more than boxes.
entries.gt_896158d0d56310: after the puncture, the target may still reach you
entries.gt_89dab7cac76fc5: do not come out with evidence in hand; check the reaction and keep cover
entries.gt_89f4f031dd376f: If the filter gets wet, replace it. You can dry a sock on a pipe, but not a route.
entries.gt_8c33449fa6a377: listen to the signal through the pipe before the second blow
entries.gt_8c78d9e9c4e7c6: plasma is inaccurate and eats energy cells quickly
entries.gt_8c8d6c9cf3e4dc: Barni respects people who count rounds
entries.gt_8ca6e6658c9452: rare mass for NII and rumors
entries.gt_8cfa4ab5714900: do not carry it through an ordinary kitchen without a reason
entries.gt_8d547bd7d4632f: go with water, a filter, dense food, and a ready retreat
entries.gt_8dd368af0e6f83: cut extra light, change angle, and keep PSI or energy reserve
entries.gt_8ea2894e86b7ed: A Wild one with empty hands can still bring a crowd. Watch the passages, not only the pocket.
entries.gt_8edb286657274d: passes where a live stamp is needed
entries.gt_8f25e79f9db93a: look for the source, close the passage, and do not spend everything on the first bodies
entries.gt_9034e259badaec: keep one step back before using it
entries.gt_903f003c93dd0f: take a return route, PSI, water, and strong single-target damage
entries.gt_904b31301c568d: dirt, documents, and medicine go through one inspection
entries.gt_908c0303f32fd4: treat seeds and sap as a sample, not a salad
entries.gt_90e7171e5323fd: trust up close costs more than a bullet
entries.gt_90fd7d34e57857: at a checkpoint, a tourniquet is sometimes more important than a round
entries.gt_9206814e54292b: a long fight in a narrow doorway catches on corners
entries.gt_925789e3f1e71e: height does not cancel samosbor or hunger
entries.gt_9272cdf86113c6: scientists pay for composition; liquidators ask about the source
entries.gt_da2b313dcb2951: Wet sanitary-treatment act. Smells of lye, pipe slime, and someone else's trust.
entries.gt_dafce4e0a02144: Write-off act where an infected sample became an empty ampoule, and the empty ampoule became a bonus.
entries.gt_dbb557082717b1: Narrow quick thrust. Damage 13. Longer than a knife, weaker than an axe. Durability 65
entries.gt_dc7b6a83bc8816: PSI impulse with a small rupture: 12 PSI, 30 damage. Do not stand near the target.
entries.gt_dd46be514bec8d: Ticket for a line that officially does not exist.
entries.gt_dd4e1744b2017d: Industrial acid in an unlabeled bottle.
entries.gt_dd9cec0f08fd2d: Matte test tube with mutagenic white residue. Nobody looks at it longer than a signature on form 728/01-D.
entries.gt_ddb66c6c2f40d4: Official bank line: amount, signature, term, and a hint of a service entrance for the debtor.
entries.gt_e1a3e74aa498aa: The test tube is sealed crookedly. The sample is good for denunciation, the market, or a bad mistake.
entries.gt_e2c2e743fb5153: Packaged multipoint impulse: 18 PSI, hits enemies in sight. An expensive answer to a crowd.
entries.gt_e2d66f95b74f16: Dark print on paper. The mushroom shift starts from it.
entries.gt_e37704a5d0cec1: List after Istotit: who was sheltered, who vanished, who is convenient to write in. Use, turn in, sell, hide, or forge it.
entries.gt_e65421a199c737: Clean form for an application, pass, or forgery. The stamp decides the price.
entries.gt_e776cead656285: Referral from the medpost. Good for a doctor, archive, or awkward conversation.
entries.gt_e89879e6d372a4: Old revolver. Damage 38. Very slow precise shot
entries.gt_e921e4c3306c27: Return mark: 5 PSI. Places a point that the Recall clot later pulls toward.
entries.gt_e9df98b2383758: Penciled map of the courtyard and nearby rooms. Can lead to a stash or someone else's door.
entries.gt_ea633044625896: Ration forgery for a fast queue. Use it to sell to the market, or turn it in as evidence.
entries.gt_eb34a37d9f9f08: The part wants back into the mechanism.
entries.gt_ec9edbce6294cb: Weapon tube with no right to error.
entries.gt_f05a3357a84cd2: Can with bolts on a string. Use it to make a short false noise trail and pull attention off the route.
entries.gt_f0be39f6fd982a: Heavy crowbar. Damage 24. Medium reach, high durability 120
entries.gt_f17ecd558f7cbd: Narrow circle of light for dark corridors. Battery: 10 game hours (5 minutes)
entries.gt_f27971700922df: Glowing residue in a thick jar. NII asks to keep it away from lamps and clearance logs.
entries.gt_f458d6d1d8f9ab: Order for lift access. At the post they check it against stamp and time.
entries.gt_f4d02975610562: Black strip from an old gasket.
entries.gt_fa2951053a63f7: Sealed jar with a voice anomaly. Jean accepts only a closed lid.
entries.gt_fc8f4ad7cddeb6: Someone else's file on thick cardboard.
entries.gt_fd85b380bc405f: NII field PSI tool: 3 PSI, 15 damage. Short impulse, recoil in the temples.
